design_philosophy.core_concept: The 'Tesla' of Delivery Bikes. Clean, efficient, reliable.
design_philosophy.visual_style: Swiss Minimalist meets Tech Utility. High whitespace, structured grids, bold typography for headings, vibrant functional colors.

primary_font.name: Blair ITC Medium
primary_font.notes: If Blair ITC is not available via webfonts, use 'Montserrat' with 'uppercase' and 'tracking-widest' to mimic the wide geometric feel, or 'Michroma' for a more tech look.

secondary_font.name: Poppins
secondary_font.usage: Body text, Descriptions, UI elements (buttons, inputs)

buttons.primary: rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-semibold text-white shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all hover:-translate-y-1 bg-gradient-to-r from-[#27AAE1] to-[#2BB673]
buttons.secondary: rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-semibold bg-[#191919] text-white hover:bg-[#2c2c2c] transition-all
buttons.outline: rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-semibold border-2 border-[#191919] text-[#191919] hover:bg-[#191919] hover:text-white transition-all

cards.feature: bg-white p-8 rounded-2xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow border border-gray-100
cards.pricing: bg-white p-10 rounded-3xl shadow-xl border border-gray-100 relative overflow-hidden

assets.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for all UI icons. Use 'Bike', 'Battery', 'MapPin', 'ShieldCheck', 'TrendingUp' for features.

visual_enhancers.gradients: Use the Blue-to-Green gradient (#27AAE1 -> #2BB673) for key interactive elements and text highlights (bg-clip-text).
visual_enhancers.shadows: Soft, diffuse shadows (shadow-lg) for floating elements. Sharp, hard shadows not recommended for this premium B2B look.
visual_enhancers.border_radius: Rounded-xl to Rounded-3xl for containers. Pill shape for buttons.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text on gradient backgrounds is always White. Dark text on Off-White backgrounds.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus ring in Primary Blue.

universal_guidelines: Do not use generic 'Inter' font for headings.
Use 'lenis' for smooth scrolling if possible.
Ensure all images have alt text.
Use data-testid on all interactive elements.
instructions_to_main_agent: Focus on building a high-trust, conversion-oriented B2B site. The 'Quote Request' is the primary goal. Make the 'Get a Quote' button always visible (sticky header). Use the 'Bento' grid layout for the 'Why Flockee?' section to make specs look interesting. Use the Blue/Green gradient as the 'Brand Signature' but don't overuse it - keep backgrounds clean white.
